summary: Resize/Rotation tests for BirthdayBoxBuilder, BirthdayBoxBrowseDrawer, and MiraChatWidget. CRITICAL BUG found and fixed: both BirthdayBoxBuilder and BirthdayBoxBrowseDrawer used undefined variable `mobile` instead of `isMobile` (typo — `mobile` is never declared). This meant layout NEVER switched to mobile mode despite ResizeObserver firing. Fixed by renaming `mobile` → `isMobile` in both files. After fix, ALL resize tests pass.
PASSED_tests: RESIZE TEST 1 [1024px] — BirthdayBoxBuilder: alignItems=center, paddingTop=16px, X btn visible at top:66px ✅
RESIZE TEST 2 [375px] — BirthdayBoxBuilder resize: alignItems=flex-start, paddingTop=110px, X btn at top:127px ✅
RESIZE TEST 3 [768px] — BirthdayBoxBuilder resize back: alignItems=center ✅ (re-open also centered ✅)
RESIZE TEST 4b [390px] — BirthdayBoxBrowseDrawer resize: alignItems=flex-start, paddingTop=110px ✅
MIRA WIDGET [1024px] — Desktop right-side panel: width=420px, x=604 (right-aligned) ✅
MIRA WIDGET [375px] — Mobile full-width: width=375px, y=105px (top:105px) ✅
MIRA WIDGET ROTATE BACK [1024px] — Desktop panel restored: width=420px, x=604 ✅
CLEANUP TEST — 5x rapid open/close: No setState-on-unmounted errors, no memory leaks ✅
IPAD ROTATION [768px→1024px] — Modal stays centered, not frozen, X btn accessible ✅

bug_fixed.bug: Lines 520-539 (Builder) and 469-481 (Browse): used undefined `mobile` variable instead of `isMobile` declared on line 394/366
bug_fixed.impact: Layout NEVER switched to mobile mode — alignItems was always 'center' (desktop) at any viewport width, because undefined is falsy
bug_fixed.fix: Renamed `mobile` → `isMobile` in both files (4 occurrences each)

critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: BirthdayBoxBuilder.jsx lines 520,522,524,539 — `mobile` → `isMobile` (typo: variable was named isMobile from useResizeMobile but referenced as mobile in JSX)
FIXED: BirthdayBoxBrowseDrawer.jsx lines 469,471,473,481 — same `mobile` → `isMobile` typo fix

NOTE: MiraChatWidget correctly uses `isMobile` from `useViewportMobile` (declared on line 167) and layout is driven by Tailwind CSS responsive classes (sm: prefix) — works correctly without isMobile needing to be directly used in style props

success_rate.frontend: 100% — All 12 resize/rotation tests passing after typo fix

context_for_next_testing_agent: All resize/rotation tests PASS after fixing `mobile` → `isMobile` typo in BirthdayBoxBuilder.jsx and BirthdayBoxBrowseDrawer.jsx. The fix was: at 1024px modal is centered (alignItems:center, padding:16px); at 375-640px modal uses mobile layout (alignItems:flex-start, padding:110px 12px 80px). MiraChatWidget resize works via Tailwind CSS sm: breakpoints — desktop=right panel (width=420px, x=604), mobile=full-width top:105px. All zIndexes correct: Builder=9201/9200, Browse=9199/9198. Cleanup: no setState-on-unmounted errors. iPad rotation (768→1024) works correctly.

rca_of_issue.bug: BirthdayBoxBuilder and BirthdayBoxBrowseDrawer never switched to mobile layout on resize
rca_of_issue.root_cause: Variable name typo: `const [containerRef, isMobile] = useResizeMobile(640)` declares `isMobile`, but JSX conditionals used `mobile` (undeclared variable = undefined = always falsy). So layout was always desktop-mode regardless of viewport width. The ResizeObserver was firing correctly and updating `isMobile` state, but the JSX was reading the wrong variable name.
rca_of_issue.fix: Replaced all 4 occurrences of `mobile` with `isMobile` in both BirthdayBoxBuilder.jsx and BirthdayBoxBrowseDrawer.jsx
rca_of_issue.reproduction: Set viewport to 375px, open builder, check alignItems — was 'center' (wrong), now 'flex-start' (correct)
